title: Synthesis 13
description: A dynamic shader effect featuring a dark navy-black background (#0a0f12) with two prominent sine wave patterns creating an organic, flowing composition. The primary visual element is a vibrant green sine wave (#4a9e3d) positioned in the center-left area with high softness (0.62), creating a soft-edged, glowing appearance that dominates the composition. A secondary golden-tan sine wave (#c49a2e) is positioned in the upper-right quadrant with lower softness (0.42), creating a more defined edge. Both waves have animated motion with different speeds (0.3 and 0.5 respectively), creating a sense of fluid movement. The waves blend using OKLCH and OKLAB color spaces, producing subtle color transitions and gradients where they interact. A wave distortion effect with sine-type modulation (angle 52°, frequency 1.6) adds subtle rippling and warping across the entire composition, creating depth and movement. The overall effect is soft and atmospheric with a slight film grain overlay (strength 0.1) adding subtle texture and visual noise. The composition has a dreamy, ethereal quality with warm and cool color contrasts creating visual interest and depth.
